name: 揭露型（身份真相炸彈）
description: 角色在關鍵時刻用一句話揭露真實身份，讓全場陷入震驚。對白通常簡短有力，搭配周圍角色的驚恐反應形成強烈對比。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: This is Stark Stoken. / Shut up. Do you know what this is? / Yeah, it's a ring and it's ugly. / This is Stark's feminist token. The Starks never show their faces in public. This token represents that.
